subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! The True One, exalted be His glory, hath in the Scriptures and Tablets enjoined His servants unto that which conduceth to exaltation and transcendence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین حق جل جلاله در زبر و الواح عباد خود را بانچه سبب علو و سمو است امر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @justice and wrath of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
